tests.soil_crop_tests.field_tests.test_field module

tests.soil_crop_tests.field_tests.test_field.mock_crop_data() → CropData
tests.soil_crop_tests.field_tests.test_field.mock_time() → RufasTime
tests.soil_crop_tests.field_tests.test_field.mock_field_data() → FieldData
tests.soil_crop_tests.field_tests.test_field.test_field_init_defaults()

Tests that Field initializes correctly with default values when no parameters are provided.

tests.soil_crop_tests.field_tests.test_field.test_manage_field(mocker: MockerFixture) → None

Tests that all subroutines are correctly called by the main routine in field.

tests.soil_crop_tests.field_tests.test_field.test_check_crop_planting_schedule(all_events: List[PlantingEvent], events_remaining: List[PlantingEvent], events_occurring_today: List[PlantingEvent]) → None

Tests that the planting schedule is updated correctly and that planting events are executed correctly. This test contains four cases: some planting events occur on the current day, all planting events occur on the current day, no planting events occur on the current day, and no planting events left.

tests.soil_crop_tests.field_tests.test_field.test_check_fertilizer_application_schedule(events: List[FertilizerEvent], remaining_events: List[FertilizerEvent], current_events: List[FertilizerEvent]) → None

Tests that fertilizer events that occur on the current day are properly selected and executed.

tests.soil_crop_tests.field_tests.test_field.test_check_manure_application_schedule() → None

Tests that ManureEvents are correctly checked and converted to ManureEventNutrientRequests when scheduled.

tests.soil_crop_tests.field_tests.test_field.test_check_manure_application_schedule_integration() → None

Integration test for check_manure_application_schedule().

tests.soil_crop_tests.field_tests.test_field.test_create_manure_request(nitrogen_mass, phosphorus_mass, manure_type, expected_request, expected_log)

Tests _create_manure_request for both nutrient-requested and no-nutrient cases.

tests.soil_crop_tests.field_tests.test_field.test_check_crop_harvest_schedule(mocker: MockerFixture, year: int, day: int, all_harvest_events: List[HarvestEvent], current_harvest_events: List[HarvestEvent], expected_harvest_count: int) → None

Tests that the schedule of crop harvests is determined correctly for any given day.

tests.soil_crop_tests.field_tests.test_field.test_harvest_heat_scheduled_crops(mock_time: RufasTime, mock_field_data: FieldData, crop_num: int, should_harvest_results: List[bool], expected_harvest_count: int) → None

Tests that all crops which are set to be harvested based on heat level are.

tests.soil_crop_tests.field_tests.test_field.test_filter_events(events: List[BaseFieldManagementEvent], year: int, day: int, expected_remaining: List[BaseFieldManagementEvent], expected_current: List[BaseFieldManagementEvent]) → None

Tests that list of events are properly checked and have current events correctly removed from them.

tests.soil_crop_tests.field_tests.test_field.test_plant_crop(mocker: MockerFixture, mock_crop_data: CropData, crop_reference: str, heat_scheduled: bool, year: int, day: int) → None

Tests that a new Crop instance is properly created and added to a field.

tests.soil_crop_tests.field_tests.test_field.test_record_planting(heat_scheduled: bool, year: int, day: int, field_name: str, field_size: float, expected_info_map: Dict, expected_value: Dict) → None

Tests that crop plantings are correctly recorded to the OutputManager.

tests.soil_crop_tests.field_tests.test_field.test_harvest_crop(mock_crop_data: CropData, mock_time: RufasTime, mock_field_data: FieldData, crop_reference: str, harvest_op: HarvestOperation, rainfall: float) → None

Tests that crops are harvested correctly.

tests.soil_crop_tests.field_tests.test_field.test_harvest_crop_warnings(mock_crop_data: CropData, mock_time: RufasTime, mock_field_data: FieldData, crop_count: int, expected_message: str) → None

Tests that warnings are raised correctly to the OutputManager.

tests.soil_crop_tests.field_tests.test_field.test_remove_dead_crops(mock_crop_data: CropData) → None

Tests that dead crops are removed from a field correctly. This test contains four cases: there are no crops in the field, some crops in the field are dead, no crops in the field are dead, and all crops in the field are dead.

tests.soil_crop_tests.field_tests.test_field.test_reset_crop_field_coverage_fractions(mock_crop_data: CropData, crop_count: int, expected_field_proportion: float) → None

Tests that crops in a field correctly have their proportion reset when there are other crops present.

tests.soil_crop_tests.field_tests.test_field.test_start_dormancy(mock_crop_data: CropData, daylength: float, threshold_daylength: float) → None

Tests that each crop’s dormancy method is called.

tests.soil_crop_tests.field_tests.test_field.test_execute_fertilizer_application(mocker: MockerFixture, mix_name: str, requested_n: float, requested_p: float, requested_k: float, ammonium_fraction: float, depth: float, remainder: float, year: int, day: int, field_size: float, fertilizer_applied: bool) → None

Tests that fertilizer applications are being correctly executed and recorded.

tests.soil_crop_tests.field_tests.test_field.test_execute_fertilizer_application_error(field_name: str, mix_name: str, available_mixes: Dict) → None

Tests that errors are correctly raised when a mix is specified to be used but is not listed in the available mixes.

tests.soil_crop_tests.field_tests.test_field.test_execute_fertilizer_application_with_invalid_args(depth: float, remainder: float, expected_depth: float, expected_remainder: float, invalid_combination: bool) → None

Tests that fertilizer applications with invalid arguments are caught, recorded in the OutputManager and execution with corrected values takes place.

tests.soil_crop_tests.field_tests.test_field.test_determine_optimal_fertilizer_mix(nitrogen: float, phosphorus: float, mixes: Dict[str, Dict[str, float]], expected: float) → None

Tests that the optimal mix for meeting the requested nutrients is found correctly.

tests.soil_crop_tests.field_tests.test_field.test_formulate_fertilizer_required(nitrogen_frac: float, phosphorus_frac: float, potassium_frac: float, requested_nitrogen: float, requested_phosphorus: float, requested_potassium: float, expected: Dict[str, float]) → None

Tests that fertilizer formulations are made correctly.

tests.soil_crop_tests.field_tests.test_field.test_record_fertilizer_application(mix_name: str, total_mass: float, nitrogen_mass: float, phosphorus_mass: float, potassium_mass: float, ammonium_fraction: float, depth: float, remainder: float, year: int, day: int, field_name: str, field_size: float) → None

Tests that fertilizer applications are correctly recorded in the OutputManager.

tests.soil_crop_tests.field_tests.test_field.test_execute_manure_application(mocker: MockerFixture, nitrogen: float, phosphorus: float, manure_type: ManureType, coverage: float, depth: float, remainder: float, year: int, day: int, supplement: ManureSupplementMethod, fertilizer_applied: bool, only_nitrogen_unmet: bool, supplied_manure: NutrientRequestResults, expected_request: NutrientRequest, expected_unmet_nitrogen: float, expected_unmet_phosphorus: float) → None

Tests that manure is applied to the soil correctly.

tests.soil_crop_tests.field_tests.test_field.test_apply_and_record_manure_application(mocker: MockerFixture) → None

Tests that the manure application is applied and recorded correctly.

tests.soil_crop_tests.field_tests.test_field.test_validate_application_depth_and_fraction(mocker: MockerFixture, depth: float, remainder: float, soil_max_depth: float, expected_depth: float, expected_remainder: float, expect_log: bool) → None

Tests that the application depth and fraction are validated correctly.

tests.soil_crop_tests.field_tests.test_field.test_validate_application_depth_and_fraction_raises_for_missing_soil_layers() → None
tests.soil_crop_tests.field_tests.test_field.test_validate_application_depth_and_fraction_raises_for_missing_bottom_depth() → None
tests.soil_crop_tests.field_tests.test_field.test_handle_unmet_nutrients(mocker: MockerFixture, requested_n: float, requested_p: float, supplied_n: float, supplied_p: float, method: ManureSupplementMethod, unmet_n: float, unmet_p: float, expect_log: bool, expect_warn: bool, expect_fertilizer: bool, only_nitrogen_unmet: bool) → None

Tests that the handling of unmet nutrients is performed correctly.

tests.soil_crop_tests.field_tests.test_field.test_execute_manure_application_with_invalid_args(mocker: MockerFixture, depth: float, remainder: float, expected_depth: float, expected_remainder: float, invalid_combination: bool) → None

Tests that the manure application executor raises errors and runs correctly when invalid arguments are passed.

tests.soil_crop_tests.field_tests.test_field.test_record_manure_application(field_name: str, field_size: float, dry_mass: float, dry_fraction: float, coverage: float, nitrogen: float, phosphorus: float, depth: float, remainder: float, year: int, day: int, expected_info: Dict, expected_values: Dict, potassium: float) → None

Tests that manure applications are recorded correctly.

tests.soil_crop_tests.field_tests.test_field.test_add_manure_water(mocker: MockerFixture, manure_application: NutrientRequestResults, manure_type: ManureType, expected_liters: float, converted: bool) → None

Tests that manure water is correctly calculated and stored.

tests.soil_crop_tests.field_tests.test_field.test_record_nutrient_application_error(depth: float, remainder: float, name: str, year: int, day: int, expected_info_map: dict, expected_error_message: str) → None

Tests that manure and fertilizer application errors are correctly recorded to the OutputManager.

tests.soil_crop_tests.field_tests.test_field.test_execute_daily_processes(mock_crop_data: CropData, field_size: float, crops_growing: bool, residue: float, light: float, mean_temp: float, min_temp: float, max_temp: float, annual_mean_temp: float, transpiration: float, stressors: bool) → None

Tests that all component processes and subroutines are correctly called in Field.

tests.soil_crop_tests.field_tests.test_field.test_cycle_water(field_size: float, rainfall: float, manure_water: float, snow_content: float, runoff: float, high_water_table: bool, residue: float, light: float, min_temp: float, max_temp: float, mean_temp: float, surface_residue: float, crop_1_proportion: float, crop_2_proportion: float, crops_growing: bool) → None

Tests that cycle_water() correctly executes all water processes on its soil profile and the crops it contains.

tests.soil_crop_tests.field_tests.test_field.test_determine_watering_amount(rainfall: float, manure_water: float, days_into_interval: int, water_deficit: float, watering_occurs: float, irrigation: float, old_method: bool) → None

Tests that the correct amount of water to be used to water is field is calculated, and that the counters and totals are updated correctly.

tests.soil_crop_tests.field_tests.test_field.test_get_manure_water(mocker: MockerFixture, water_amount: float, field_name: str) → None

Tests that manure water is correctly retrieved and logged.

tests.soil_crop_tests.field_tests.test_field.test_handle_water_in_crop_canopies(precipitation: float, canopy_capacity: float, first_canopy_amount: float, second_canopy_amount: float, expected_return: float, expected_first: float, expected_second: float) → None

Tests that water is properly added and removed from the crop canopies of field objects.

tests.soil_crop_tests.field_tests.test_field.test_evaporate_from_crop_canopies(demand: float, canopy_water_1: float, canopy_water_2: float, expected_demand: float, expected_canopy_water1: float, expected_canopy_water2: float) → None

Tests that the evapotranspirative demand is correctly reduced by the amounts of water evaporated.

tests.soil_crop_tests.field_tests.test_field.test_determine_total_above_ground_biomass(mock_crop_data: CropData, biomasses: List[float], expected: float) → None

Tests that total above ground biomass on the field is correctly calculated.

tests.soil_crop_tests.field_tests.test_field.test_potential_evapotranspiration(extraterrestrial_radiation: float, max_temp: float, min_temp: float, avg_temp: float, expected_avg: float, expected_result) → None
tests.soil_crop_tests.field_tests.test_field.test_determine_latent_heat_vaporization(avg_temp)
tests.soil_crop_tests.field_tests.test_field.test_determine_soil_evaporation_and_sublimation_adjusted(above_ground_biomass: float, residue: float, snow_water: float, potential_evapotrans_adj: float, transpiration: float) → None

Tests that the amount of soil evaporation and sublimation is calculated correctly.

tests.soil_crop_tests.field_tests.test_field.test_determine_maximum_soil_evaporation(soil_evaporation_adj, snow_water_content)
tests.soil_crop_tests.field_tests.test_field.test_determine_soil_cover_index(above_ground_biomass: float, residue: float, snow_water: float) → None

Tests that the soil cover index is correctly calculated.

tests.soil_crop_tests.field_tests.test_field.test_annual_reset() → None

Tests that all annual reset subroutines are called properly

tests.soil_crop_tests.field_tests.test_field.test_check_tillage_schedule(events: List[TillageEvent], day: int, year: int, not_today: List[TillageEvent], is_today: List[TillageEvent]) → None
tests.soil_crop_tests.field_tests.test_field.test_liters_to_millimeters(liters: float, area: float, expected: float) → None

Tests that the conversion from liters for evenly distributed millimeters is performed correctly.

tests.soil_crop_tests.field_tests.test_field.test_field_data_initialization(latitude: float, min_daylength: float, watering_amount: float, watering_interval: int) → None

Tests that FieldData objects are initialized correctly.

tests.soil_crop_tests.field_tests.test_field.test_error_field_data_initialization(watering_amount: float, interval: int) → None

Tests that errors are correctly raised when FieldData is initialized with invalid values.

tests.soil_crop_tests.field_tests.test_field.test_record_field_watering(field_name: str, field_size: float, day: int, year: int, watering_amount: float, expected_info_map: Dict, expected_value: Dict) → None
tests.soil_crop_tests.field_tests.test_field.test_field_data_perform_annual_field_reset(annual_irrigation_water_use_total: float, expected: float) → None

Tests that annual variable was reset correctly.
